metadata.description: ITS collision training samples for tao-vl-reason fine-tuning. Converted from DAFT metropolis-v3.0 scene covering open QA, BCQ/MCQ (short + open-ended), scene/video/temporal descriptions, temporal localization, and causal linkage.

items.question: Summarize the key events in this traffic video.
items.answer: A white sedan fails to yield while making a left turn at a signalized intersection, resulting in a T-bone collision with a red sedan traveling straight. Both vehicles end up immobilized in the intersection, with the white sedan pushed across a marked crosswalk. A maroon sedan behind the white sedan stops safely without involvement.

items.question: Summarize the key events in this traffic video.
items.answer: A gray sedan makes an improper left turn from a middle lane on a multi-lane road, striking a white sedan traveling straight in the outer lane. The collision pushes the white sedan off the road and into a tree on the sidewalk, where it becomes disabled. The gray sedan continues driving and leaves the scene without stopping.
